calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-015 handcrafted goal cue diagnostic -- oracle vs absent
items.notes: EXP-0091. Critical diagnostic: if E3 cannot exploit a perfect oracle goal signal, selection mechanism is broken. If it can, representation is the bottleneck.

items.title: Direct z_world terrain pathway (MECH-152 isolation, bypasses ContextMemory)
items.note: EXQ-182 FAIL: ContextMemory attention uniform due to non-diff EMA slots. Fix: standalone TerrainHead(Linear->ReLU->Linear->Sigmoid) from z_world, same terrain_loss. Isolates MECH-152 from ContextMemory question.
